summary: Tested iteration 159 features: Glossary UI in LegitimacyPanel, shared auSpelling utility, Ground Priority Reorder. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend loads correctly with all new features working.
critical_code_review_comments: auSpelling.js correctly implements 80+ American-to-Australian spelling replacements with case preservation
LegitimacyPanel.jsx correctly implements glossary toggle with data-testid='glossary-toggle' and 'What do these terms mean?' text

LegitimacyPanel.jsx glossary content includes definitions for Outcome Impact (Determinative/Influential/Minor), Legal Alignment (Direct authority/Analogous/Weak), Evidence Support (Strong/Partial/Limited), Viability Rating, and Contingent Ground
LegitimacyPanel.jsx useState moved before early return to fix React hooks error
GroundsOfMerit.jsx correctly imports auSpelling from shared utils/auSpelling.js
GroundsOfMerit.jsx implements reorder mode with drag-and-drop and arrow buttons, Save/Cancel buttons
ReportView.jsx correctly imports and uses auSpelling from shared utils
BarristerView.jsx correctly imports and uses auSpelling for MarkdownBlock text
Backend grounds.py PUT /cases/{case_id}/grounds/reorder endpoint correctly defined BEFORE {ground_id} routes (lines 538-563)
Backend grounds.py GET /cases/{case_id}/grounds correctly sorts by priority_order first (lines 429-433)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 159 verified all three requested features: (1) Glossary UI at bottom of Appellate Viability Assessment panel with toggle button 'What do these terms mean?' - expands to show definitions for Outcome Impact, Legal Alignment, Evidence Support, viability ratings, and Contingent Ground. (2) Australian English spelling normaliser extracted to shared utils/auSpelling.js and imported into GroundsOfMerit, LegitimacyPanel, ReportView, BarristerView. (3) Ground Priority Reorder with PUT /api/cases/{case_id}/grounds/reorder endpoint that saves priority_order to DB, and GET grounds returns sorted by priority_order first. Frontend shows 'Reorder Priority' button when case is unlocked and has 2+ grounds. Reorder mode shows drag handles, arrow buttons, Save Order and Cancel buttons.

details.toggle_button: data-testid='glossary-toggle' with text 'What do these terms mean?'

details.replacements: 80+ American-to-Australian spelling replacements with case preservation

details.backend_endpoint: PUT /api/cases/{case_id}/grounds/reorder accepts ground_ids list, saves priority_order to DB
details.backend_sorting: GET /api/cases/{case_id}/grounds returns grounds sorted by priority_order first
details.frontend_button: data-testid='reorder-grounds-btn' shows when case unlocked and 2+ grounds
details.reorder_mode: Save Order and Cancel buttons, drag handles, arrow buttons for reordering

contingent_warning_badge.details: data-testid='contingent-warning' renders for ineffective_counsel grounds with is_contingent flag
